This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] ModelContext interface: existence and properties of interface object
  assert_equals: prototype of self's property "ModelContext" is not Function.prototype expected function "function () { [native code] }" but got function "function EventTarget() { [native code] }"

  assert_equals: prototype of ModelContext.prototype is not Object.prototype expected object "[object Object]" but got object "[object EventTarget]"
